reference: I recently came to know that I have a gallbladder stone of six centimeters, a left ovarian functional cyst of two millimeters, and two fibroids in the uterus. I feel heaviness in the lower abdomen and slight pain on the left side and leg. I do not want any surgery but prefer medications. Please help. I am from India. Sona.
text: I recently came to know that I have a gallbladder stone of 6 centimeters, a left ovarian functional cyst of 2 millimeters, and two fibroids in the uterus. I feel heaviness in the lower abdomen and slight pain on the left side and leg. I do not want any surgery, but prefer medications. Please help. I am from India. Sona.
